title: sphaeropteris feani
intro: Sphaeropteris feani, also known as the Fijian tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyathea. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in the Pacific Islands for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sphaeropteris feani include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. Sphaeropteris feani can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
